## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? Link the issue: Closes #AN-XXX -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Infra / tooling (`infra` / `chore`)
- [ ] Docs (`docs`)
- [ ] Spec / RFC (`spec`)

## Checklist

- [ ] CI is green (lint, typecheck, tests, build).
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by tests.
- [ ] Touches durability? A **replay test** is included/updated.
- [ ] Touches a failure path? A **chaos assertion** is included/updated.
- [ ] Migrations are forward-only and downgrade-tested.
- [ ] Docs / relevant RFC updated.
- [ ] No secrets or PII added to code, logs, or workflow history.
